context-protocols.name: Context Protocols, Authentication & Integration Standards
context-protocols.description: MCP, A2A, authentication standards, integration patterns, agent identity

tools.name: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
tools.notes: 97M monthly SDK downloads; agent-to-tool communication; Anthropic → AAIF/LF; JSON-RPC over stdio/HTTP

tools.name: A2A (Agent-to-Agent)
tools.notes: 150+ orgs in production; agent-to-agent coordination; Google → Linux Foundation; Agent Cards

tools.name: ACP (Agent Communication Protocol)
tools.notes: ~1,013 (archived); IBM → merged into A2A Aug 2025; REST-native; archived

tools.name: ANP (Agent Network Protocol)
tools.notes: Decentralized agent collaboration; P2P, DID-based identity, JSON-LD; open internet focus

tools.name: UCP (Universal Commerce Protocol)
tools.notes: 20+ retail partners; Google + Shopify; agent-driven commerce; MCP/A2A compatible

tools.name: x402
tools.notes: 150M+ transactions; Coinbase → Linux Foundation; HTTP 402 stablecoin payments; 10+ chains

tools.name: AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol)
tools.notes: Google ecosystem; payment authorization; cryptographically signed mandates; integrates with UCP

tools.name: MPP (Stripe)
tools.notes: Early 2026 launch; Stripe + Tempo; session-based micropayments; fiat + stablecoin

tools.name: AGEX
tools.notes: Academic; agent credential lifecycle; complete protocol spec with AIDs, Delegation Chains, ARP

tools.name: OAN
tools.notes: Academic; trust-governed agent identity; layered stack: Identity, Discovery, Invocation, Governance

tools.name: NANDA
tools.notes: Community; DNS for AI agents; decentralized agent registry; AgentAddr + AgentFacts; ZTAA framework

tools.name: Agora Protocol
tools.notes: Academic; IoA scalable communication; structured routines + natural language interfaces

tools.name: AConP (Cisco)
tools.notes: Drafting; LAN agent invocation; OpenAPI/JSON-based; standard interface for local agents

tools.name: WIMSE (IETF)
tools.notes: Active WG; workload identity; SPIFFE successor; architecture + token formats; RFC expected 2027-2028

tools.name: AIMS (IETF)
tools.notes: Q1 2026; AI agent auth/authz; draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-01; `agent_assertion` grant type

tools.name: SCIM for Agents
tools.notes: Q1 2026; agent lifecycle mgmt; draft-abbey-scim-agent-extension; Agents + AgenticApplications resources

tools.name: Authed
tools.notes: Early access; agent-to-agent auth; unique agent IDs, dynamic tokens, registry; no static credentials

tools.name: Agent Name Service (ANS)
tools.notes: Research; agent identity resolution; PKI-backed directory; maps agent IDs to capabilities/keys/endpoints
